overall.description: A cinematic shot from a wizarding video game showing students in robes practicing spellcasting at wooden tables in a covered outdoor classroom pavilion. The scene features misty forest backgrounds and warm natural lighting filtering through the wooden structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor wizarding classroom with wooden tables

student in foreground completes wand casting motion with visible spell energy

student practicing spellcasting movements with wand at wooden table

rustic wooden tables arranged throughout the pavilion for student practice
misty forest with tall trees visible through the open sides of the pavilion
stone tile flooring covering the ground of the pavilion

segments.scene_description: A static view of an outdoor wizarding classroom under a large wooden pavilion. Students in dark robes stand at wooden tables practicing spellcasting, while a professor observes from the back near a dark doorway. The background shows a misty forest, and green spell effects occasionally light up as students practice their magic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, atmospheric view of an outdoor wizarding classroom that emphasizes the contrast between the structured pavilion and the wild, misty forest beyond. It begins with a wide perspective of students in dark robes gathered around wooden tables, their movements punctuated by flashes of green spell effects. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts toward the depth of the pavilion where a professor observes the practice from the shadows of a dark doorway. The scene finally settles on the interplay between the warm, natural lighting of the wooden structure and the dense, ethereal fog clinging to the distant trees.
